review_pass: round-4 plan-review report supplied by operator: 2 blockers, 6 strong warnings, 7 minor warnings
patch_pass: round-4 blocker and strong-warning remediation applied to the plan documents
summary: Round 4 returned CHANGES_REQUESTED for two blockers and six strong warnings. This patch pass updates the plan documents for B1/B2 and W1-W6: the Phase 3 Pydantic decomposition formula now uses rows_succeeded + rows_failed ONLY and treats routed/quarantine counters as display-only subset fields; Phase 5 explicitly chooses to translate all assertion-only RowOutcome tests in this PR with no xfail/Stage-4 deferral; Phase 4 Task 4.4 now requires the four-by-three durability matrix and documents _RunFailedWithPartialResultError cause semantics; the closed-set test discipline now includes an AST fixture corpus, import-presence checks, and a positive legal-pair Hypothesis sweep; the hidden core.py:2199 diversion counter site remains cited in Phase 3 Task 3.3; all ADR-019 symbol inventory allowlist invocations use the directory-form config path; and the operator migration doc requirements now cover SchemaCompatibilityError guidance for stale DBs and resume-across-migration attempts. The plan is patched, not approved: run plan-review round 5 before execution.

patched_blockers.title: Decomposition formula double-counts post-Phase-3
changes: Phase 3 Task 3.5 now marks the new formula as the B1 fix and defines sum_terminal = rows_succeeded + rows_failed ONLY.
rows_routed_success, rows_routed_failure, and rows_quarantined are described as display-only subset fields and removed from _validate_row_decomposition inputs.
Callers are instructed to pass routed/quarantine counters to _validate_response_counter_subsets instead.

patched_blockers.title: Deferred RowOutcome assertions conflict with the green-suite gate
changes: Overview D6 now explicitly chooses to translate assertion-only RowOutcome tests in this PR.
Phase 5 Category B is now MUST move with this PR; no xfail or Stage 4 manifest path remains.
Commit and PR templates now state Category B assertions are translated in this PR and no ADR-019 Stage 4 xfails remain.

patched_strong_warnings.title: Task 4.4 needs four named regression tests times three asserted properties
changes: Phase 4 Task 4.4 now names fresh/resume I1a and I1b durability tests.
Each matrix row requires propagation, FAILED finalization, and row preservation assertions.
Graceful-shutdown skip is documented as an additional test, not a substitute for the matrix.

patched_strong_warnings.title: Closed-set test discipline needs fixture corpus, positive sweep, and import-presence check
changes: Phase 1 Task 1.0 now requires a committed AST inventory fixture corpus with positive, negative, and import-presence cases.
Phase 1 Task 1.2 now adds a positive Hypothesis sweep over _LEGAL_TERMINAL_PAIRS.
Phase 5 Task 5.0 reuses the corpus and checks the directory-form allowlist in CLI tests.

patched_strong_warnings.title: Hidden DIVERTED counter site at orchestrator/core.py:2199 must be co-located with accumulator instructions
changes: Phase 3 Task 3.3 already cites core.py:2199 in the sink diversion counter update step and DoD; this patch preserved that explicit anchor.

patched_strong_warnings.title: AuditIntegrityError wrapper path needs grep verification and cause documentation
changes: Phase 4 Task 4.4 now includes rg verification for _RunFailedWithPartialResultError, original_error, from exc, and from None.
Test guidance now distinguishes internal wrapper __cause__ assertions from public Orchestrator.run() re-raise assertions.

patched_strong_warnings.title: CI config path must use subdirectory form
changes: All ADR-019 symbol inventory invocations now use --allowlist config/cicd/adr019_symbol_inventory.
Phase 1 and Phase 5 file lists now describe config/cicd/adr019_symbol_inventory/ as a directory.

patched_strong_warnings.title: Resume-across-migration error message must point at migration doc
changes: Phase 5 migration guide now requires stale DB and resume-across-migration failures to raise SchemaCompatibilityError.
The message must name token_outcomes.completed, token_outcomes.path, and docs/operator/migrations/adr-019.md.
Migration-doc grep verification includes SchemaCompatibilityError and the migration-doc path.

remaining_minor_warnings.title: Dataclass decorator line-number drift remains informational
remaining_minor_warnings.note: The plan still requires implementers to grep current symbols before edits; exact decorator line drift is not execution-blocking.

remaining_minor_warnings.title: AST gate PR-time-only nuance remains reviewer-sensitive
remaining_minor_warnings.note: The plan keeps the AST inventory as a phase-boundary and PR closeout gate; reviewers should confirm this is acceptable.

next_actions: Run plan-review round 5 against the current plan documents before executing the ADR-019 implementation.
If round 5 passes, implement with the atomic Stage 2/3 merge boundary preserved.
If round 5 still objects to the residual minor warnings, patch those exact lines before implementation.
